title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!
